notes: Pesapal publishes no machine spec, only a developer portal + Postman docs. Authored OpenAPI 3.0 by hand from the API 3.0 JSON reference. The adaptor itself exposes generic get()/post()/request() helpers over the Pesapal base URL (https://pay.pesapal.com/pesapalv3/api); the concrete Auth/URLSetup/Transactions endpoints modeled here are the ones those helpers call in practice. Field lists for SubmitOrderRequest and GetTransactionStatus confirmed against vendor docs.
